name: OneColumnLayout
summary: Default single-column page layout with header and footer slots, plus centered content area. Required root component for all Alberta Government service pages.
import: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabPageBlock, GoabAppHeader, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components'

slots.name: header
slots.description: Header content area - use section element with slot="header". Contains GoabMicrositeHeader and/or GoabAppHeader.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Main content area - wrap content in GoabPageBlock to control width and get responsive margins.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer content area - use section element with slot="footer". Contains GoabAppFooter.

criticalNotes: REQUIRED: Every government service page MUST use GoabOneColumnLayout as root
REQUIRED: Wrap main content in GoabPageBlock with width prop (e.g., '704px' or 'full')
Use section elements with slot attribute for header and footer areas
Never use div or GoabContainer as page wrapper - only GoabOneColumnLayout
commonMistakes: Using div as page root instead of GoabOneColumnLayout
Missing slot attribute on header/footer sections
Using GoabContainer as page layout (it's for content grouping, not page structure)

basicUsage.webComponent: Page Content
basicUsage.react: Page Content
basicUsage.angular: Page Content

pageBlockWidthOptions.704px: Optimal for forms and article content (reading width)
pageBlockWidthOptions.full: Full width for dashboards and data tables
